name: Cheese Vat
blurb: The core unit of any modern dairy — precise coagulation, controlled thermal processing and automated curd cutting via stainless harp knives, minimising dry-matter loss across every batch.
desc: The core unit of any modern dairy. Engineered for precise coagulation, controlled thermal processing and automated curd cutting via specialised stainless harp knives — minimising dry-matter loss across every batch.

name: Milk Processing Tank
blurb: A multi-purpose, triple-wall insulated process vessel for pasteurisation, boiling, fermentation and cooling. Pillow-plate heat transfer distributes temperature evenly and prevents scorching at the wall.
desc: A multi-purpose, triple-wall insulated process vessel for pasteurisation, boiling, fermentation and cooling. Pillow-plate heat transfer distributes temperature evenly across the surface and prevents scorching at the wall.

name: Cheese Pre-press
blurb: An engineered system for continuous self-pressing and curd-block formation under whey. Ensures uniform porosity and precise block profiling before final moulding.
desc: An engineered system for continuous self-pressing and curd-block formation under whey. Ensures uniform porosity and precise block profiling prior to final moulding, with a perforated false-bottom for controlled drainage.

name: Cheese Press
blurb: Pneumatic pressing with multi-stage, programmable pressure control for final shaping and moisture extraction. Adaptable to any mould format with high cycle repeatability.
desc: Pneumatic pressing systems with multi-stage, precise pressure control for final shaping and moisture extraction. Fully adaptable to various mould formats with high cycle repeatability and programmable pressure curves.
